title: Genie Agents enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Save a chat as a Genie Agent**: You can now save a Genie One thread as a Genie Agent. See [Create an agent](/aws/en/genie-one/chat#create-an-agent).
* **Conversation sharing (Public Preview)**: Sharing an individual Genie Agent conversation is now in Public Preview. See [Share a conversation](/aws/en/genie-agents/talk-to-genie#share-conversation).
* **Access email terminology**: Access-granted and access-request emails now use the Genie Agent's name.
* **Download visualization fix**: Fixed a bug where choropleth and point map visualizations were not returned by the download visualization API.
* **Benchmark results fix**: Fixed a bug where benchmark results incorrectly showed as empty.
